zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Norbury於1393年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer33歲，母親Mrs. Petronilla Norburie30歲。她於大約1407年與Lord John Hende結婚。她去世於1462年8月28日在她的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Norbury于1393年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer33岁，母亲Mrs. Petronilla Norburie30岁。她于大约1407年与Lord John Hende结婚。她去世于1462年8月28日在她的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from any of various places so named, for example in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, and Surrey, so called from Old English north ‘north’ + burh ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Norbury was born in 1393, in England, her father, Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer, was 33 and her mother, Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, was 30. She married Lord John Hende about 1407. She died on 28 August 1462, in her hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Norbury est née en 1393, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Hende environ 1407. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1462, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Norbury 1393 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer 33 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Petronilla Norburie 30. Sie hat um 1407 Lord John Hende geheiratet. Sie starb am 28. August 1462 im Alter von 69 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Norbury è nata il nel 1393 nel England, sua padre, Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Hende circa 1407. Morì il 28 agosto 1462, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Norbury(이)가 1393년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Petronilla Norburie(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 Lord John Hende(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1462년 8월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Norbury nasceu em 1393, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Hende aproximadamente 1407. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1462, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Norbury родилась в 1393 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Hende около 1407 г. Она умерла 28 августа 1462 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Norbury nació en 1393, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Norburie Lord High Treasurer, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs. Petronilla Norburie, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lord John Hende aproximadamente 1407. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1462, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
